member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.DilithiaAccount
member.summary: Represents a recovered Dilithia HD wallet account.

member.summary: Represents a recovered Dilithia HD wallet account.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.DilithiaKeypair
member.summary: A public/secret key pair with the derived address.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.DilithiaKeypair.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A public/secret key pair with the derived address.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.DilithiaSignature
member.summary: The result of signing a message.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.DilithiaSignature.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The result of signing a message.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter
member.summary: Interface for post-quantum cryptographic operations backed by the native core library. All methods may throw on invalid input.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.GenerateMnemonic
member.summary: Generate a new BIP-39 mnemonic phrase.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.ValidateMnemonic(System.String)
member.summary: Validate a BIP-39 mnemonic phrase. Throws on invalid input.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.RecoverHdWallet(System.String)
member.summary: Recover the default HD wallet account (index 0) from a mnemonic.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.RecoverHdWalletAccount(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Recover a specific HD wallet account by index.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.CreateHdWalletFileFromMnemonic(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create an encrypted wallet file from a mnemonic and password.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.CreateHdWalletAccountFromMnemonic(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create an encrypted wallet file for a specific account index.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.RecoverWalletFile(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Recover an account from an encrypted wallet file.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.AddressFromPublicKey(System.String)
member.summary: Derive an address from a public key (hex).

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.ValidateAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Validate an address string. Returns the normalized address or throws.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.AddressFromPkChecksummed(System.String)
member.summary: Derive a checksummed address from a public key (hex).

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.AddressWithChecksum(System.String)
member.summary: Add a checksum to a raw address.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.ValidatePublicKey(System.String)
member.summary: Validate a public key (hex). Throws on invalid input.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.ValidateSecretKey(System.String)
member.summary: Validate a secret key (hex). Throws on invalid input.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.ValidateSignature(System.String)
member.summary: Validate a signature (hex). Throws on invalid input.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.SignMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sign a message with a secret key.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.VerifyMessage(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verify a message signature.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.Keygen
member.summary: Generate a new key pair.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.KeygenFromSeed(System.String)
member.summary: Generate a key pair from a seed (hex).

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.SeedFromMnemonic(System.String)
member.summary: Derive a seed from a mnemonic phrase.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.DeriveChildSeed(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Derive a child seed from a parent seed at a given index.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.ConstantTimeEq(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constant-time comparison of two hex strings.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.HashHex(System.String)
member.summary: Hash data (hex) using the current hash algorithm.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.SetHashAlg(System.String)
member.summary: Set the active hash algorithm (e.g. "sha3-256", "blake3").

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.CurrentHashAlg
member.summary: Get the currently active hash algorithm name.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.IDilithiaCryptoAdapter.HashLenHex
member.summary: Get the output length (in hex chars) of the current hash algorithm.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Crypto.NativeCryptoBridge
member.summary: P/Invoke bridge to the dilithia_native_core shared library. This is a reference implementation — callers should prefer the interface for testability.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient
member.summary: Primary client for interacting with a Dilithia node. Provides typed async methods for balance queries, nonce lookups, transaction submission, contract calls, name-service resolution, deploy/upgrade, and shielded-pool operations.

member.name: F:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.SdkVersion
member.summary: Current SDK version.

member.name: P:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.RpcUrl
member.summary: The JSON-RPC endpoint URL.

member.name: P:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.BaseUrl
member.summary: The chain base URL for REST endpoints.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Builder entry point.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.#ctor(System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Create a new Dilithia client. Prefer for the fluent builder API.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.GetBalanceAsync(Dilithia.Sdk.Models.Address,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch the token balance for an address.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.GetNonceAsync(Dilithia.Sdk.Models.Address,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch the next nonce for an address.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.GetReceiptAsync(Dilithia.Sdk.Models.TxHash,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch a transaction receipt by hash.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.WaitForReceiptAsync(Dilithia.Sdk.Models.TxHash,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Poll for a transaction receipt until it becomes available.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.GetNetworkInfoAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch network information (chain ID, block height, base fee).

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.GetGasEstimateAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch the current gas estimate from the node.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.QueryContractAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a read-only contract query.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.SendCallAsync(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submit a pre-built call envelope to the node.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.CallContractAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Build and submit a contract call in one step.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.DeployContractAsync(Dilithia.Sdk.Models.DeployPayload,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deploy a contract.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.UpgradeContractAsync(Dilithia.Sdk.Models.DeployPayload,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Upgrade a contract.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.ResolveNameAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolve a name to an address via the name service.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.ReverseResolveAsync(Dilithia.Sdk.Models.Address,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reverse-resolve an address to a name.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.ShieldedDepositAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deposit into the shielded pool.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.ShieldedWithdrawAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Withdraw from the shielded pool.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.GetCommitmentRootAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Query the current commitment Merkle root from the shielded pool.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.IsNullifierSpentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check whether a nullifier has already been spent.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.BuildContractCall(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Build a contract call envelope.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.BuildDeployCanonicalPayload(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Build the canonical payload for a deploy or upgrade request (keys sorted for deterministic signing).

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClient.ReadWasmFileHex(System.String)
member.summary: Read a WASM file from disk and return its contents as a hex string.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClientBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for constructing a .

member.summary: Create a builder targeting the given RPC URL.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClientBuilder.WithHttpClient(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Set a custom (useful for testing with mock handlers).

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClientBuilder.WithTimeout(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Set the request timeout.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClientBuilder.WithChainBaseUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Set the chain base URL for REST endpoints (derived from rpcUrl if omitted).

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClientBuilder.WithJwt(System.String)
member.summary: Set a JWT bearer token for authenticated endpoints.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClientBuilder.WithHeader(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a custom HTTP header sent with every request.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.DilithiaClientBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build and return a configured .

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Exceptions.DilithiaException
member.summary: Base exception type for all Dilithia SDK errors.

member.summary: Create a new .

member.summary: Create a new with an inner cause.

member.summary: Thrown when the HTTP response has a non-2xx status code.

member.summary: The HTTP status code.

member.summary: The response body, truncated for display.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Exceptions.HttpException.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new .

member.summary: Thrown when the JSON-RPC endpoint returns an error object.

member.summary: The JSON-RPC error code.

member.summary: The human-readable error message from the node.

member.summary: Create a new .

member.summary: Thrown when an operation exceeds its deadline.

member.summary: A description of the operation that timed out.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Exceptions.DilithiaTimeoutException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Create a new .

member.summary: Low-level JSON-RPC 2.0 helper over .

member.summary: Send a JSON-RPC request and return the result field.

member.summary: Send a GET request and return parsed JSON.

member.summary: Send a POST request with JSON body and return parsed JSON.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidation
member.summary: Result of validating WASM bytecode.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidation.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Result of validating WASM bytecode.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator
member.summary: Client-side WASM bytecode validation utilities.

member.name: F:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator.WasmMagic
member.summary: WASM magic bytes: \0asm

member.name: F:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator.WasmVersion1
member.summary: WASM version 1 bytes.

member.name: F:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator.MaxBytecodeSize
member.summary: Maximum bytecode size in bytes (512 KB).

member.name: F:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator.BaseDeployGas
member.summary: Base gas cost for deploying a contract.

member.name: F:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator.PerByteGas
member.summary: Gas cost per byte of bytecode.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator.Validate(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Validate raw WASM bytecode. Checks magic bytes, version header, and size constraints.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Validation.BytecodeValidator.EstimateDeployGas(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Estimate the gas cost for deploying WASM bytecode. Uses a simple heuristic: BaseDeployGas + len(wasmBytes) * PerByteGas.

member.summary: A commitment in the shielded pool.

member.summary: A commitment in the shielded pool.

member.summary: A nullifier used to prevent double-spending.

member.summary: A nullifier used to prevent double-spending.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.StarkProof
member.summary: A STARK proof with verification key and public inputs.

member.summary: A STARK proof with verification key and public inputs.

member.name: T:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.IDilithiaZkAdapter
member.summary: Interface for zero-knowledge proof operations backed by the native ZK library.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.IDilithiaZkAdapter.PoseidonHash(System.Int64[])
member.summary: Compute a Poseidon hash over the given inputs.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.IDilithiaZkAdapter.ComputeCommitment(System.Int64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compute a shielded-pool commitment.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.IDilithiaZkAdapter.ComputeNullifier(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compute a nullifier from a secret and nonce.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.IDilithiaZkAdapter.GeneratePreimageProof(System.Int64[])
member.summary: Generate a STARK preimage proof.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.IDilithiaZkAdapter.VerifyPreimageProof(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verify a STARK preimage proof.

member.name: M:Dilithia.Sdk.Zk.IDilithiaZkAdapter.GenerateRangeProof(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Generate a STARK range proof.

member.summary: Verify a STARK range proof.
